posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick Start Create a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment Welcome to Hexo! posts.title: Hello Hexo
posts.text: 第一次使用 Hexo，虽然感觉这种静态博客挺不错的，但我怎么看不懂官网文档呢？自定义页面是不是比较麻烦呢？感觉学习成本又要加大了。努努力！😁
